news.headline: Long John Silver's celebrates Lent with Coconut Butterfly Shrimp and OREO Cheesecake, starting Feb. 24.
news.summary: Indulge in Delicious Specials from Feb. 24 in LOUISVILLE, Ky. during the Lent season, with Long John Silver's® offering discounts on flavorful shrimp dishes. Commencing on Feb. 24, enjoy irresistible shrimp specials at Long John Silver's.

news.headline: Motorola Solutions and FairCom host Dev Day in Brazil, strengthen partnership for Flex software suite, emphasizing technical expertise.
news.summary: FairCom and Motorola Solutions broaden their partnership globally with a joint dev team training event for their Brazilian teams aiding Motorola’s Flex public safety software suite. The event indicates FairCom’s dedication to enhancing the technical skills of the Flex development team beyond the U.S. The in-person workshops enabled FairCom’s senior engineers to collaborate closely with Motorola.

news.headline: Consensus Cloud Solutions (NASDAQ: CCSI) to showcase AI-powered healthcare solutions at HIMSS25 in Las Vegas from March 3-6. Booth #1361.
news.summary: A reputable provider of digital cloud fax and interoperability solutions, Consensus Cloud Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCSI) will be present at HIMSS25 in Las Vegas, NV, from March 3-6. Interested individuals can visit booth #1361 to discover how Consensus technology aids healthcare entities in tackling unstructured data obstacles, attaining smooth interoperability, and enhancing operational productivity. During the event, Consensus is scheduled to conduct customer interactions and thought leadership sessions.

news.headline: Vaunt exceeds $1.5M ARR in first year, 100,000 downloads, and 590 flights, boosting memorable travel experiences for users.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR) shared exciting news about their private aviation platform, Vaunt, which has achieved a significant milestone by generating $1.5 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) in its inaugural year. This represents a remarkable 50% growth since mid-2024. Alongside this financial success, Vaunt has also seen over 100,000 app downloads and successfully completed 598 flights in 2024, solidifying its position as a primary catalyst for Volato's expansion. The CEO emphasized that these numbers not only showcase growth but also underline Vaunt's increasing significance.

news.headline: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy calls for crypto cleanup as Jailstool drops value. Portnoy suggests taking out scammers from crypto space amidst Jailstool price drop from 21 cents to 1 cent, wiping out investor funds.
news.summary: Dave Portnoy, the Barstool Sports founder, is advocating for a cleanup of the cryptocurrency sector as the value of his cryptocurrency, Stool Prisondente (CRYPTO: JAILSTOOL), has sharply declined. In a recent statement, Portnoy emphasized the need to eliminate scammers and dishonest actors from the industry, mentioning the importance of maintaining integrity in the crypto space. Following a significant drop in Jailstool's price from 21 cents to 1 cent, causing a loss of millions of dollars for investors, Portnoy expressed frustration towards individuals who ignore the risks associated with Memecoins and subsequently complain about their losses. This development comes amid a broader concern regarding the volatile nature of cryptocurrencies and the vulnerability of retail investors.

news.headline: A report found illegal ingredients for weight loss drugs entering U.S., FDA warned against it.
news.summary: In Washington, a recent report by the Partnership for Safe Medicines has uncovered a concerning trend of unauthorized and illegal ingredients entering the U.S. market for popular diabetes and obesity injectables. These substances are being sourced from overseas, despite U.S. regulations prohibiting their importation. The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has issued alerts cautioning against the use of unauthorized bulk drug ingredients such as semaglutide and tirzepati by drug compounders. This poses a significant risk to consumers as these unsafe ingredients may compromise the efficacy and safety of these medications. The report serves as a warning about the influx of harmful substances into the U.S. pharmaceutical supply chain, highlighting the need for stricter enforcement measures to protect public health.

news.headline: Federal Home Loan Bank of New York releases 2024 financial highlights, covering Q4 and full-year data.
news.summary: Today, the Federal Home Loan Bank of New York, FHLBNY, shared its unaudited financial results for the quarter and year ending on December 31, 2024, in New York City. The released report provides a summary of the bank's financial performance during this period, showcasing key figures.

news.headline: Steve Simpson appointed to lead FanDuel Sports Network South & Southeast regions as Executive VP, overseeing team partnerships, bringing 25+ years of experience to the role.
news.summary: Today, FanDuel Sports Network, a subsidiary of Main Street Sports Group, appointed Steve Simpson as the Executive Vice President handling FanDuel Sports Network South and FanDuel Sports Network Southeast. With over 25 years of experience, Simpson will now oversee team partnerships in these regions. Prior to this role, he was responsible for leading team partnerships in the West/SoCal, Southwest/Oklahoma, and Midwest/Kansas City/Indiana regions. The move aims to strengthen the network's presence in the South and Southeast regions.

news.headline: Bittensor's TAO surges with 20.7% gains in 7 days, reaching $454.58 with a market cap of $3.81 billion. Expert predicts a rise to $640.
news.summary: Bittensor (TAO) has experienced a significant surge in its price, reaching $454.58 with a market cap of $3.81 billion. This surge follows an announcement that Coinbase will soon support Bittensor, leading to heightened activity on social media. Over the past 24 hours, TAO has seen a 9.5% increase, and over the past 7 days, it has surged by 20.7%. Additionally, industry expert Quinten Francois has predicted that TAO could reach $640, emphasizing the strength of this bullish trend. The cryptocurrency NEAR Protocol (NEAR) is currently priced at $3.41, with a market cap of $4.04 billion, experiencing an 8.9% increase in the last 24 hours and a 2.9% increase in the last 7 days. Meanwhile, Internet Computer (ICP) is priced at $7.09, with a market cap of $3.4 billion, showing a 3.4% increase in the last 24 hours and a 0.6% increase in the last 7 days. Expert opinions and market trends indicate a positive outlook for TAO in the near future.

news.headline: Repligen Corp reports Q4 adjusted EPS of 44 cents beating consensus of 41 cents, with sales at $167.55 million. CEO optimistic for 2025 outlook.
news.summary: Repligen Corp (NASDAQ:RGEN) reported a fourth-quarter adjusted EPS of 44 cents, down from 48 cents last year but surpassing the expected 41 cents consensus. The bioprocessing technology company recorded sales of $167.55 million for the quarter, a slight increase from $166.6 million a year prior, in line with the estimated $167.67 million. Olivier Loeillot, President and CEO of Repligen, highlighted the positive momentum in their portfolio during the quarter, with total revenue growing by 13% (excluding COVID-19 impact) despite facing a 2% currency headwind. Additionally, total orders exceeded sales by 6%, driven by the Filtration and Analytics segments. The company remains cautious about the situation in China.

news.headline: NCTC partners with eero for better home connectivity. NCTC represents US independent broadband providers.
news.summary: In Overland Park, Kansas, on February 20, 2025, the National Content & Technology Cooperative (NCTC), which stands for independent broadband and cable providers in the US, revealed a partnership with eero, an Amazon subsidiary renowned for its mesh Wi-Fi technology. This collaboration aims to enhance connectivity services for NCTC's members nationwide.

news.headline: NIRS to hold 16th Annual Retirement Policy Conference in Washington, D.C. on March 3-4, 2025. Strengthening retirement infrastructure discussed.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, the National Institute on Retirement Security (NIRS) is set to host its 16th Annual Retirement Policy Conference titled "Choices, Challenges, and Opportunities | Strengthening Our Retirement Infrastructure" in Washington, D.C. This event will gather leading experts and policymakers to discuss key issues surrounding retirement.

Aiman El-Ramly to lead Zema Global's M&A committee, brings expertise from Chief Strategy Officer role.
news.summary: Aiman El-Ramly has been appointed to lead Zema Global's Special Committee on Mergers & Acquisitions in addition to his role on the company's Board of Directors. Zema Global is a top provider of data management and analytics solutions for businesses in the energy, commodities, and financial industries. Aiman, who previously held the position of Chief Strategy Officer, will play a key role in shaping the company's strategic decisions. This move underscores Zema Global's commitment to growth and development in the sector.

Fed's Musalem: Uncertainty issues are not yet a major restraint on the economy.
Fed's Musalem: Inflation expectations are anchored right now.
Dovetail integrates AI assistant in Slack for customer insights, improving decision-making; used by thousands of organizations.
news.summary: A company based in San Francisco, Dovetail, has introduced a new AI assistant within Slack aimed at prioritizing customer knowledge during conversations. This AI assistant, called Ask Dovetail, allows teams to quickly access customer insights within Slack to ensure that product decisions are based on comprehensive customer context. Dovetail's customer insights hub is utilized by thousands of organizations for this purpose.

LACI receives $500,000 grant to reduce congestion & pollution in 9 US cities - CA, FL, KY, NY, PA, OR, D.C. - impacting 1 in 6 Americans.
news.summary: A substantial investment of $500,000 has been allocated to back technology, business model, and policy pilot initiatives aimed at diminishing congestion and pollution. This initiative not only seeks to alleviate environmental issues but also aims to bolster the American economy and entrepreneurship. The project will be implemented in nine U.S. cities across California, Florida, Kentucky, New York, Pennsylvania, Oregon, and Washington D.C., collectively representing a significant portion of the population with 1 in every 6 Americans residing in these areas. This project is set to kick off in Los Angeles this February.

news.headline: APhA honors 7 recipients with 2025 Immunization Award for improving vaccination rates.
news.summary: In the latest news from Washington on February 20, 2025, the American Pharmacists Association (APhA) announced the recipients of the prestigious 2025 Immunization Champion Awards. Seven individuals and organizations have been honored for their exceptional efforts in enhancing vaccination rates in the community. This award highlights their remarkable contributions towards promoting immunization. The APhA aims to acknowledge and celebrate their outstanding dedication in advancing public health initiatives.

OCI Energy and Arava Power partner for 260 MWac solar project in Texas; 2nd agreement.
news.summary: In San Antonio on February 20, 2025, OCI Energy, a prominent clean energy company from Texas, and Arava Power, a solar energy innovator from Israel, have established a partnership for the second time to launch Project SunRoper. This joint venture aims to develop a solar project with a capacity of 260 MWac.

news.headline: MFS Trade School offers industry-leading kitchen exhaust hood cleaning certification program to improve kitchen safety standards.
news.summary: In Sanford, Florida, businesses in the food service and hospitality industries are facing increased pressure to maintain clean kitchen environments due to new laws and strict fire safety regulations. This has led to the launch of a Commercial Kitchen Exhaust Hood Cleaning Certification Program by MFSTradeSchool.com, a leading provider in this field. The program aims to provide thorough training in ensuring spotless kitchen exhaust hood cleaning, in line with industry standards. This initiative comes at a crucial time as businesses strive to comply with changing regulations.

news.headline: Martin Marietta declares $0.79 quarterly dividend per share for common stock, payable on March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on February 20, 2025, Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) disclosed that its Board of Directors authorized a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.79 per share on the Company’s common stock. The dividend is set to be distributed on March 31, 2025, to shareholders listed as of the closing of business on March 3, 2025.

news.headline: Axon stock continues to slide post-analyst downgrade due to partnership issues, defended by Morgan Stanley.
news.summary: Following an analyst downgrade on Wednesday, Axon's stock continued to decline due to concerns over a strained relationship with a former partner now considered a competitor. The company's shares have seen a persistent slide, despite efforts by Morgan Stanley to defend the stock. This development has raised worries amongst investors and analysts about the future performance of Axon.

news.headline: Cruise stocks plummeted due to crackdown threat on tax avoidance, Stifel believes sell-off was overdone, undercutting support levels.
news.summary: After a U.S. official accused the cruise industry of dodging U.S. taxes, several cruise stocks fell below crucial support levels in the market. The stocks experienced a sell-off following the threat of a crackdown. However, Stifel believes that the reaction to Trump's warning was exaggerated and not reflective of the actual situation. The specific numbers involved in the stock movement weren't provided in the rephrased text.

SDRE tackles San Diego housing crisis, creating attainable homes as new development struggles to keep up.
news.summary: In San Diego, amid a housing crisis, SDRE, a local homebuilding group ingrained in the community, is committed to providing affordable housing. Despite the pressing need, new housing development in San Diego hasn't met demand.

news.headline: Erik Waldin named Chairman of Board at Anthony & Sylvan Pools, a leading US pool builder and service provider.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 20, 2025, based in Warminster, Pennsylvania, Anthony & Sylvan Pools, a leading company in residential pool and spa construction, renovations, and services in the US, revealed the appointment of Erik Waldin as the new Chairman of the Board of Directors. Waldin, taking on this role, comes with a wealth of experience and expertise to lead the company to further success.

Smart Mobile Labs, a Boldyn Networks company, secures major 5G campus network deal with Deutsche Bahn, largest railway company.
news.summary: MUNICH - On February 20, 2025, Smart Mobile Labs (SML), a subsidiary of Boldyn Networks (Boldyn), announced a significant partnership with Deutsche Bahn AG, the world's largest railway company. This collaboration will focus on providing cutting-edge private 5G network solutions. The agreement, part of a framework deal, marks a pivotal move for the companies involved.

COSPRO debuts new electric grinder sets at The Inspired Home Show in Chicago. Launching QIC-101SPL, QIC-201SPL, QIC-201SPGH.
news.summary: Chicago-based company COSPRO revealed the introduction of three new kitchen tools, namely QIC-101SPL, QIC-201SPL, and QIC-201SPGH, during The Inspired Home Show. The products will be exhibited at Booth #S3660 in the South Building. COSPRO is known for its premium-quality and groundbreaking kitchenware innovations.

news.headline: Shell Shock Technologies hosts inaugural Legends and Heroes Shootout for veterans and first responders, raising funds for K9 Heroes 4 Heroes and NRA. Event to take place on April 27-28, 2025.
news.summary: A fundraising event will be held on April 27-28, 2025, in EUBANK, Ky., where MLB stars, celebrities, and veterans will come together for two days of shooting and golfing. The event aims to raise funds for K9 Heroes 4 Heroes and the NRA. Shell Shock Technologies, LLC. (SST), a prominent name in the ammunition industry, will be part of this initiative.

news.headline: Boeing names Jeff Shockey as executive VP of Govt Ops, Global Public Policy & Corp Strategy starting Feb. 24.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on February 20, 2025, Boeing revealed that Jeff Shockey has been appointed as the new executive vice president of Government Operations, Global Public Policy, and Corporate Strategy, starting from February 24. Shockey will be in charge of managing Boeing's worldwide public policy initiatives.
